title: Session 21 — The Assassins’ Escape
bodyText:
# What happened
Fly + invisibility + bag carried them over the crowds; back to **[[pc-varen|Varen]]'s place undetected**. [[giuseppe|G]] checked in by sending stone. **[[pc-felson|Felson]] and [[pc-brolin|Brolin]] read [[root-darkpass|Root]]'s journal** (see [[roots-journal]]) — Sellie and the baby's deaths, [[the-underdark|the Underdark]] dig, the sickness, Tad's mission, and Root's cold assessments of Brolin. Felson + [[cumb]] bought **thieving tools from Mr. Spells**; the rest staged a normal breakfast. By morning, **rumors of Root's death** were spreading through a confused [[koviz]]. Felson headed for [[filbert]]'s house.
